---
title: "Benjamin Mensah Dadzie"
page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<div class="hero-section">
  <div class="container">
    <p class="small-caps" style="margin-bottom: 1.5rem;">PhD Researcher · Computer Science · IB/AP Mathematics Tutor · Sports Analyst</p>
    <h1 class="hero-name">Benjamin<br>Mensah Dadzie</h1>
    <div class="accent-line"></div>
    <p class="hero-subtitle">Concept Drift · Data Streams · Machine Learning · Statistical Analysis</p>
    <p style="max-width: 560px; color: var(--text-muted); margin-top: 1.2rem; font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.7;">
      PhD candidate at the University of Silesia in Katowice, researching novel methods for 
      detecting and characterizing drift in non-stationary data streams. I bridge rigorous statistical 
      theory with practical machine learning applications and I bring the same analytical lens to sports.
    </p>
    <div style="margin-top: 2rem;">
      <a class="btn-outline-gold" href="about.qmd">About Me</a>
      <a class="btn-outline-gold" href="research.qmd">Research</a>
      <a class="btn-outline-gold" href="sports.qmd">Sports Analytics</a>
      <a class="btn-outline-gold" href="https://github.com/Kuukudadzie" target="_blank">GitHub</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="container" style="padding: 4rem 0;">

  <!-- Stats row -->
  <div class="grid-stats">
    <div class="stat-card">
      <div class="stat-number">8+</div>
      <div class="stat-label">Publications</div>
    </div>
    <div class="stat-card">
      <div class="stat-number">3</div>
      <div class="stat-label">Journal Papers</div>
    </div>
    <div class="stat-card">
      <div class="stat-number">5+</div>
      <div class="stat-label">Conference Papers</div>
    </div>
    <div class="stat-card">
      <div class="stat-number">4</div>
      <div class="stat-label">Scholarships</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Research highlights -->
  <div style="margin-top: 3rem;">
    <p class="section-label">Research Focus</p>
    <div class="grid-2">
      <div class="pub-card">
        <span class="tag">Concept Drift</span>
        <h4 style="margin-top: 0.8rem; font-size: 1rem;">Drift Detection in Data Streams</h4>
        <p style="color: var(--text-muted); font-size: 0.92rem;">
          Novel feature-rank based methods for identifying when the underlying distribution 
          of a data stream has shifted — critical for adaptive ML systems.
        </p>
      </div>
      <div class="pub-card">
        <span class="tag">Classification</span>
        <h4 style="margin-top: 0.8rem; font-size: 1rem;">Multi-Classifier Drift Analysis</h4>
        <p style="color: var(--text-muted); font-size: 0.92rem;">
          Leveraging ensembles of classifiers to provide robust, feature-based drift 
          detection in non-stationary environments.
        </p>
      </div>
      <div class="pub-card">
        <span class="tag">Statistics</span>
        <h4 style="margin-top: 0.8rem; font-size: 1rem;">Statistical Tests for Drift</h4>
        <p style="color: var(--text-muted); font-size: 0.92rem;">
          Application of the Kolmogorov–Smirnov test and related non-parametric statistics 
          to two-dimensional streaming data.
        </p>
      </div>
      <div class="pub-card">
        <span class="tag">Visualization</span>
        <h4 style="margin-top: 0.8rem; font-size: 1rem;">Drift Scoring & Visualization</h4>
        <p style="color: var(--text-muted); font-size: 0.92rem;">
          Methods for scoring and visually communicating concept drift dynamics to 
          support interpretable ML systems.
        </p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Recent publications -->
  <div style="margin-top: 3rem;">
    <p class="section-label">Recent Publications</p>
    <div class="pub-card">
      <span class="tag">JAISCR 2025</span>
      <p style="margin: 0.6rem 0 0.2rem; font-size: 0.95rem;">
        Porwik, Orczyk, Wrobel, <strong>Dadzie</strong> · "A novel method for drift detection in streaming data based on measurement of changes in feature ranks"
      </p>
      <a href="https://sciendo.com/article/10.2478/jaiscr-2025-0008" target="_blank" style="font-size: 0.8rem; color: var(--gold);">Journal of AI and Soft Computing Research →</a>
    </div>
    <div class="pub-card">
      <span class="tag">ACIIDS 2025</span>
      <p style="margin: 0.6rem 0 0.2rem; font-size: 0.95rem;">
        <strong>Dadzie</strong>, Porwik · "Feature-Based Drift Detection in Non-Stationary Data Streams Using Multiple Classifiers"
      </p>
      <a href="https://link.springer.com/chapter/10.1007/978-981-96-6005-6_20" target="_blank" style="font-size: 0.8rem; color: var(--gold);">Springer ACIIDS 2025 →</a>
    </div>
    <div style="text-align: center; margin-top: 1.5rem;">
      <a class="btn-outline-gold" href="research.qmd">View All Publications</a>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>
```
